Progress Report Re: Receipt & Acknowledgment Of The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor - Rafael Gurrola.
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Raquel Fox appeared with petitioners Veronica Tellez, Candelario Munoz & Petrona Roa, the Guardians ad Litem for the for minors and one adult.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined. Brittany Anduray was placed under oath but did not testify.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to the minors Rafael Gurrola & Rodrigo Ramirez Tellez:
Settlement Amount - $1,337.12.
Attorney's Fees - $247.76.
Costs - $89.36.
The net balance of $1,000.00 for each minor, shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 3027 16th Street, San Francisco, CA 94103. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

As to the minor Rebecca Munoz and adult Rudy Cartagana:
Settlement Amount - $1,272.81.
Attorney's Fees - $297.28.
Costs - $107.24.
The net balance of $868.29 for the minor Rebecca Munoz shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 3027 16th Street, San Francisco, CA 94103. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years. The net balance of $868.29 shall be deposited in a non-blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank.

As to the minor Brittany Anduray:
Settlement Amount - $2,507.54.
Attorney's Fees - $495.50.
Costs - $178.70.
The net balance of $1,833.34, shall be deposited into a blocked account with U.S. Bank, located at 2001 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving the Compromises, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Accounts, were signed by the Court.
